channel.title: cyanide-bridged heterometallic assemblies; octacyanotungstate(v); mn(iii) schiff base complexes; single-chain magnet; 1d coordination polymers; metamagnet; ferromagnetic coupling on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in cyanide-bridged heterometallic assemblies; octacyanotungstate(v); mn(iii) schiff base complexes; single-chain magnet; 1d coordination polymers; metamagnet; ferromagnetic coupling on LMI

item.title: Neutral Low-Dimensional Assemblies Of A Mn(Iii) Schiff Base Complex And Octacyanotungstate(V): Synthesis, Characterization, And Magnetic Properties
